examples: Dave Holloway said he was still suspicious of van der Sloot and the Kalpoe brothers.
Van der Sloot has said he left Holloway on a beach near her hotel after they had kissed.
The two met while van der Sloot was in town for the poker tournament.
The judge did determine that sufficient reason exists to reopen the inquiry against van der Sloot.
The video footage shows van der Sloot is "not innocent, " Holloway's mother said Monday.
